Bash(node -e "const s=require\('simple-icons'\); console.log\('siGithub' in s, Object.keys\(s.siGithub||{}\)\); const g=s.siGithub; console.log\(g.title, g.hex, g.slug, \(g.path||''\).slice\(0,30\)\);")

Bash(cd d:/Larund-click; echo "=== embed-resource / tauri-winres versions in lock ==="; grep -A1 'name = "embed-resource"' src-tauri/Cargo.lock; grep -A1 'name = "tauri-winres"' src-tauri/Cargo.lock; echo "=== LLVM resource tools present? ==="; ls "C:/Program Files/LLVM/bin/" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "llvm-rc|llvm-windres|^rc\\.exe" ; echo "=== windres on PATH? ==="; which windres 2>/dev/null || echo "windres: NOT FOUND"; echo "=== current .cargo [env] ==="; sed -n '/\\[env\\]/,/\\[target/p' src-tauri/.cargo/config.toml)
